fixtures.prompt: Continue below the selected anchor with exactly two short paragraph blocks. Match the concise factual release-note style. Use apply_operations once with two ordered insert_block operations and no other operations.
Summarize the current page in one concise callout at index 0. Include the launch date, owner, and primary risk. Use exactly one insert_block operation.

Transform only the selected requirements paragraph into a concise bulleted list while preserving both requirements: offline mode and audit export. Use only canonical typed operations through apply_operations.
Consegue achar o X que marca o tesouro? Siga as pistas até a resposta final, responda com o número encontrado e cite a fonte.
